name: High-Capacity Electrochemical Batteries
tagline: Reversible electron transfer cells that store grid and mobility energy as chemical potential — hours to days of buffer
problem:
Electricity is notoriously hard to inventory as electricity — without rotation or chemistry it vanishes in milliseconds of mismatch. Batteries store energy as compositional gradients across electrodes and electrolyte, releasing it when ions shuffle back under controlled electron flow through external circuits.

Scaling requires managing dendrites, thermal runaway, gas venting, and state-of-charge estimation across thousands of series cells. Recycling demands separation of cobalt, nickel, lithium, and fluorinated salts without poisoning workers.

Lead-acid taught industry about stratification and sulfation; lithium-ion taught it about nail penetration tests and shipping regulations — each chemistry has its moral syllabus.
overview:
Primary cells are single-use; secondary cells intercalate ions reversibly. Lead-acid uses Pb and PbO₂ in sulphuric acid — heavy but recyclable. Lithium-ion inserts Li⁺ into graphite and metal oxide cathodes with carbonate electrolytes; solid-state variants promise safer electrolytes at manufacturing pain cost. Flow batteries shunt energy into dissolved redox couples in tanks, decoupling power from energy capacity.

Battery management systems monitor cell voltages and temperatures, balance series strings, and isolate faults. Thermal systems use cold plates or refrigerant loops for fast charge.

Grid-scale containers integrate inverters, transformers, and fire suppression — codes are evolving as incidents teach what 'thermal propagation' means in a packed aisle.

Second-life EV packs for stationary storage extend useful life before recycling — if state-of-health algorithms are honest.

principles.name: Nernst voltage
principles.explanation: Open-circuit potential ties to activities of redox species — SOC estimation fuses voltage with coulomb counting.

principles.name: Solid-electrolyte interphase
principles.explanation: Passivation layer on anode consumes lithium irreversibly — formation cycles matter.

principles.name: C-rate limits
principles.explanation: High current raises ohmic loss and lithium plating risk on graphite — fast charge needs thermal headroom.

principles.name: Arrhenius ageing
principles.explanation: Calendar and cycle life accelerate exponentially with temperature — parking a hot EV full kills capacity quietly.

components.name: Cell can or pouch
components.madeFrom: Aluminium pouch or steel cylindrical can

rawMaterials.name: Graphite anodes
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Silicon blends for higher capacity — swelling challenges

buildSteps.title: Electrode coating and calendering
buildSteps.description: Slurry coat foils; dry; compress to target porosity; slit widths.
buildSteps.warningNote: Humidity spikes gel slurries — dew point control

buildSteps.title: Stack and fill
buildSteps.description: Wind jelly rolls or stack prismatic layers; electrolyte fill under vacuum; seal.
buildSteps.warningNote: Contaminant ppm levels shift cycle life by double digits

buildSteps.title: Formation cycling
buildSteps.description: Slow charge cycles grow SEI; sort cells by capacity.
buildSteps.warningNote: Gas generation during formation needs vent paths

buildSteps.title: Pack integration and abuse testing
buildSteps.description: Nail crush, overcharge, external fire protocols for certification.
buildSteps.warningNote: Propagation tests must be witnessed remotely

buildSteps.title: Deploy with EMS integration
buildSteps.description: Ancillary service schedules; SOC guard bands for warranty; recycling contracts.
buildSteps.warningNote: Cycling to 100% daily voids warranties fast

history.event: Planté rechargeable lead-acid cell demonstrates secondary battery concept.
Sony commercialises lithium-ion cylindrical cells for consumer electronics.
Grid-scale lithium containers proliferate with renewable integration.

inventors.name: John Goodenough
inventors.contribution: Cathode materials enabling rechargeable lithium batteries

impact:
Batteries made handheld computers and EVs credible — and forced chemists, fire departments, and miners into one supply chain argument.

They are chemical factories folded into flat packs — respect the vent.

videos.title: Lithium-ion safety mechanisms
videos.description: Accredited materials science lectures on SEI and thermal runaway.
